behaviors.description: The embedding vector produced for a given query string has the correct dimensionality for the vector database index.
behaviors.justification: This is primarily a contract/wiring check between the embedding component output shape and vector index schema; integration coverage is the minimum level likely to catch real mismatches.
behaviors.test_description: Send representative query strings through the embedding path used by the API and assert the returned vector length equals the configured index dimension before insertion/search.

behaviors.description: The similarity search returns results ordered by descending cosine similarity score.
behaviors.justification: Correct ordering depends on actual vector DB/index behavior and scoring configuration, so real infrastructure validation is the minimum reliable level.
behaviors.test_description: Execute searches against a controlled dataset in the real vector store and assert returned items are monotonic in descending cosine similarity (or equivalent score field).

behaviors.description: The LLM re-ranking step changes the order of at least some results compared to the raw similarity ranking when the query has nuanced intent.
behaviors.justification: This explicitly evaluates model output quality/content (contextual relevance of ordering), so per guard it requires Agentic-level judgment.
behaviors.test_description: For nuanced queries with a fixed candidate set, compare raw similarity ranking vs LLM re-ranked output and assert at least one meaningful reorder aligned with query intent.

behaviors.description: A query with no close matches in the database returns an empty result set rather than low-relevance noise.
behaviors.justification: This behavior depends on real retrieval distributions/thresholding against the live index and is best caught at system level with real infra.
behaviors.test_description: Run out-of-domain and adversarial queries against the real indexed corpus; assert the API returns an empty set when all candidates fall below the configured relevance threshold.

behaviors.description: The end-to-end latency from receiving the query to returning re-ranked results stays below 2 seconds for the median case.
behaviors.justification: Latency SLO is an end-to-end real-infrastructure property across API, embedding, vector DB, and LLM calls; system-level measurement is the minimum to catch regressions.
behaviors.test_description: Run a representative median-load benchmark through the deployed stack, capture p50 end-to-end response time, and assert p50 < 2.0s over a statistically meaningful sample.
